ModuleTitle.helper: Used by OpenContent to sync with the DNN module title. This does not display to site visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens if you want to link directly to this section from elsewhere on the page.

SectionHeading.helper: Optional. Main heading shown above the two-column list. HTML is allowed.

IntroText.helper: Optional. Short intro shown below the heading. HTML is allowed.
IntroText.placeholder: Science-backed practices that help people slow down, reconnect, and restore.

ListIcon.helper: Find icons at FontAwesome. (Examples: fas fa-heart, fas fa-leaf, fas fa-tree, etc.)

ValueProps.helper: Required. Add the list items in the order you want them displayed. If there is an odd number of items, the extra item will appear in the first column.

Title.helper: Required. Short title for this list item. HTML is allowed.

Description.helper: Optional. Short supporting description. HTML is allowed.
Description.placeholder: Guided nature-based sessions that support attention recovery, stress relief, and reconnection.
